title: Reis Book
wikitext:
[]: Rei's Book Post by The Goose » Fri Feb 01, 2008 8:12 am Split out of here since it comprised, like, half of the thread. -Reichu Also, when Shinji is in the hospital and sees Rei next to him, shes reading her manuel. Theres something on the left side of the page. It looks like a stain.

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Feb 01, 2008 10:55 am Ah, yes! :) I remember seeing this from the old trailer caps- that book looked too detailed to be a notebook. She recites the operation schedule from memory right now, doesn't she? IIRC, the diagram in that book looks like a Sephiroth.

[]: Post by Zuggy » Fri Feb 01, 2008 2:42 pm UrsusArctos wrote: I remember seeing this from the old trailer caps- that book looked too detailed to be a notebook.

[]: Post by The Goose » Sun Feb 03, 2008 6:31 pm Screenies plz.

[]: Post by universalperson » Sun Feb 03, 2008 6:50 pm The Goose wrote: Screenies plz.

[]: Post by The Goose » Sun Feb 03, 2008 7:53 pm Can you post a link to the image itself?

[]: Post by Zuggy » Mon Feb 04, 2008 10:15 am Rei's book from the dodgy camrip, can't be bothered to correct the aspect ratio: Looks like a cut-away diagram of a heart or some other organ from the far shot, but in the closer shot it just looks like a couple of decorative twirls. The two columns of text suggest it's one of the books of the Bible to me.

[]: Post by shito » Mon Feb 04, 2008 4:28 pm it just looks like the book got a bit of water in the pages. and I didn't knew Operation Yashima was one of Jesus' adventures

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Feb 04, 2008 8:06 pm The quality is horrible, but in the upper image it looks vaguely like a sephiroth. The lower image has too much overlap.

[]: Post by The Goose » Mon Feb 04, 2008 9:27 pm Maybe someone can get a screen grab from the trailer? That might have better quality.

[]: Post by Zuggy » Tue Feb 05, 2008 1:13 pm The Goose wrote: Maybe someone can get a screen grab from the trailer? That might have better quality.

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Feb 05, 2008 9:17 pm It does look like a blotch.

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Feb 05, 2008 10:19 pm It's a blotch in the camrip version. Ornette might have a high-quality one of the trailer with him.

[]: Post by Otaprince » Thu Feb 07, 2008 10:12 pm Zugzwang wrote: The two columns of text suggest it's one of the books of the Bible to me.

[]: Post by Zuggy » Sat Mar 01, 2008 3:36 pm Got a shoot of the book from the new DVD trailer - it's a bit clearer.

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Mar 01, 2008 7:34 pm From an angle, it looks like an owl face. More like something printed or drawn on the paper as a background than a blotch.

[]: Post by AchtungAffen » Sat Mar 01, 2008 8:13 pm UrsusArctos wrote: From an angle, it looks like an owl face.

[]: Post by The Goose » Sat Mar 01, 2008 8:22 pm I'm also wrong about the image covering the words. The words are clearly printed across the image.

[]: Post by Zuggy » Sun Mar 02, 2008 9:28 am UrsusArctos wrote: From an angle, it looks like an owl face.

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Mar 02, 2008 9:49 am Gah, Mothman. Wrong thread, Zugz. Makes me wonder...subliminal messaging (ZOMG this is Lilith!!!) or is it a hint at what she's reading? Something to do with Lilith or the Dead Sea Scrolls?

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Feb 01, 2008 10:55 am Ah, yes! :) I remember seeing this from the old trailer caps- that book looked too detailed to be a notebook. She recites the operation sched
